creator: dog@virtual.org.ua
text:
When I try to execute the "make -C /usr/ports/net/avahi-app" command it fails with the following error:

gmake  all-am
gmake[4]: Entering directory `/usr/ports/net/avahi-app/work/avahi-0.6.31/avahi-gobject'
  CC     libavahi_gobject_la-ga-client.lo
ga-client.c:226:19: warning: implicit conversion from enumeration type 'AvahiClientState' to different enumeration type 'GaClientState' [-Wenum-conversion]
    priv->state = state;
                ~ ^~~~~
ga-client.c:244:38: warning: implicit conversion from enumeration type 'GaClientFlags' to different enumeration type 'AvahiClientFlags' [-Wenum-conversion]
                               priv->flags,
                               ~~~~~~^~~~~
2 warnings generated.
  CC     libavahi_gobject_la-ga-entry-group.lo
ga-entry-group.c:222:19: warning: implicit conversion from enumeration type 'AvahiEntryGroupState' to different enumeration type 'GaEntryGroupState' [-Wenum-conversion]
    priv->state = state;
                ~ ^~~~~
1 warning generated.
  CC     libavahi_gobject_la-ga-error.lo
  CC     libavahi_gobject_la-ga-record-browser.lo
  CC     libavahi_gobject_la-ga-service-browser.lo
  CC     libavahi_gobject_la-ga-service-resolver.lo
  CC     libavahi_gobject_la-signals-marshal.lo
  CC     libavahi_gobject_la-ga-client-enumtypes.lo
  CC     libavahi_gobject_la-ga-entry-group-enumtypes.lo
  CC     libavahi_gobject_la-ga-enums-enumtypes.lo
  CCLD   libavahi-gobject.la
  GISCAN Avahi-0.6.gir
g-ir-scanner: warning: Option --strip-prefix has been deprecated;
see --identifier-prefix and --symbol-prefix.
Shared object "libiconv.so.3" not found, required by "libavahi-glib.so.1"
Command '['/usr/ports/net/avahi-app/work/avahi-0.6.31/avahi-gobject/tmp-introspectQ9p8Xc/Avahi-0.6', '--introspect-dump=/usr/ports/net/avahi-app/work/avahi-0.6.31/avahi-gobject/tmp-introspectQ9p8Xc/functions.txt,/usr/ports/net/avahi-app/work/avahi-0.6.31/avahi-gobject/tmp-introspectQ9p8Xc/dump.xml']' returned non-zero exit status 1
gmake[4]: *** [Avahi-0.6.gir] Error 1
gmake[4]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/net/avahi-app/work/avahi-0.6.31/avahi-gobject'
gmake[3]: *** [all] Error 2
gmake[3]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/net/avahi-app/work/avahi-0.6.31/avahi-gobject'
gmake[2]: *** [all-recursive] Error 1
gmake[2]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/net/avahi-app/work/avahi-0.6.31'
gmake[1]: *** [all] Error 2
gmake[1]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/net/avahi-app/work/avahi-0.6.31'
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/net/avahi-app

Fix: 

I have no idea
How-To-Repeat: Run "make -C /usr/ports/net/avahi-app" on FreeBSD 10-STABLE amd64
